entity.summary: Historical centralized cryptocurrency exchange whose former exchange domain now serves unrelated crypto-casino content.
entity.notes: Classified inactive rather than dead because the reviewed evidence establishes historical exchange identity and current domain repurposing but does not establish a reliable terminal shutdown date.

evidence.title: Coinsbit exchange registry entry
evidence.notes: Registry source identifies the historical Coinsbit centralized exchange candidate.

evidence.title: Coinsbit historical exchange domain archive
evidence.notes: Historical snapshots preserve the former exchange domain; the current domain serves unrelated crypto-casino content.
